extortion.description: [AI generated] "Bloom Family Eye Surgeons is a leading ophthalmology practice located in Newport News, Virginia. The company focuses on providing comprehensive eye care services including eye examinations, cataract surgery, glaucoma care, diabetic eye care, contact lens fitting, and emergency eye care. The experienced team of eye surgeons and optometrists are committed to helping patients improve and maintain their vision through various advanced treatments and procedures."
